properties.title: Clayton Cox
properties.description:
提示 1: Clay 杀死了试图杀他的人之兄
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于你推入水中的那个人？"
- "他想要复仇吗？"
- *回答任何问题

提示 2: Clay 已经和 Edwina Cox 结婚
- * 在医疗帐篷中找到皱巴巴的信

提示 3: 打算在康复后仍然担任帮派领袖
- * 学习提示 1
- "你能躲避法律多久？"
- "我们都必须付出代价"

properties.title: DR 梭罗·斯特里克兰
properties.description:
提示1：梭罗的输血实验至今尚未成功

- "告诉我关于你自己的事？"
- "告诉我关于你的实验？"

提示2：梭罗秘密地让他的病人接触西班牙流感的实验性药物。
- *完成失踪药材任务后
- "你的药物供应商不见了"

提示3：梭罗的医疗技能过去曾受到质疑
- *在斯旺西医生的办公室找到警告信

Hint 2: Darius is a former Romanian political activist

Hint 3: Darius does not want to see his children anymore, to avoid being a burden to them
- *After getting Hint 1
- *Speak to Clayton Darby
- *Find Darius Petrescu's Letter

properties.title: Stella Fishburn
properties.description:
提示 1：Stella 就像是 Rufus 的母亲
- "个人问题"
- "你一个人吗？"
- *回答任何问题

提示 2：Stella 对 Rufus 的关注加剧了她儿子 Seymour 的嫉妒
- *偷听

提示 3：Stella 似乎能够抑制她儿子 Seymour 的攻击性
- *在提示 1 之后
- *与 Seymour 交谈

提示 4：

properties.title: 展位迪格比
properties.description:
Hint 1: Booth and Edwina Cox have recently killed a man in retaliation
- *Speak to Edwina cox
- Find the Warning Note in the beginning of the game

Hint 2: Booth may be in love with Edwina Cox, but she is the true leader of the gang
- "Your life in London?"
- "About this part of town?"

Hint 3: Booth believes in supernatural creatures, and events
- *Speak to Edwina Cox

Hint 4: Booth has already tried to find a job, so he could quit the Wet Boot Boys
- *Find the Cover Letter and read it

properties.title: 马丁·南丁格尔
properties.description:
提示1：马丁利用了伊妮德·吉林厄姆的记忆衰退来为自己谋利
- *偷听

提示2：马丁选择成为一个糟糕的商人而不是帮派成员
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你不是真正的商人"

提示3：马丁在父母感染瘟疫后抛弃了他们
- *在提示1之后
- "个人问题"
- "你利用了吉林厄姆小姐"
- "你的借口是什么？"

提示4：马丁有时会把伊妮德·吉林厄姆和她的儿子杰克搞混

properties.title: 恩尼德·吉灵汉
properties.description:
提示 1: 伊妮德的薄弱记忆被马丁·奈丁格尔利用，以谋取自己的利益
- *窃听

提示 2: 伊妮德的儿子杰克被杀了
- *找到血腥的信

提示 3: 伊妮德对她的儿子杰克感到内疚
- *购买音乐盒并检查

提示 4: 伊妮德有时会混淆她的儿子杰克和马丁·奈丁格尔
- *与马丁·奈丁格尔交谈

properties.title: 本杰明·帕尔默
properties.description:
Hint 1: Benjamin is a war veteran
- "Your life in London?"
- "Did you steal that man's medication"
- *Answer anything

Hint 2: Benjamin needs medication since he came back from the front
- *Hint trigger after Hint 1
- "Personal Question"
- "Tell me about the war"
- "You should not feel ashamed"

Hint 3: Benjamin is opposed to his son's wish to join Wet Boot Boys gang
- *After Hint 1
- "Personal Question"
- "Your son wants to join a gang"
- *Answer Anything

properties.description:
提示1：托马斯对自己在战争中的毁容感到负责
- *找到T.埃尔伍德的医疗档案并阅读

提示2：托马斯因伤势过于羞愧而不敢见家人

- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你受伤的真正原因"
- "为什么要撒谎！"
- "你不能永远躲藏"

提示3：托马斯将塞尔玛·豪克罗夫特视为证明他没有希望的活证据

properties.title: 威廉·马歇尔的回忆录
properties.description: *After getting McCullum's Report, You will receive a theatre key and backstage door will be unlocked. You will go down and continue till you reach a room full of frames of Doris Fletcher's play. You will find a small room in front of the Head Statue and "The man who was dead" frame

properties.title: 固定便条
properties.description: *On the wall. After getting McCullum's Report, You will receive a theatre key and backstage door will be unlocked. You will go down and continue till you reach a room full of frames of Doris Fletcher's play. You will find a small room in front of the Head Statue and "The man who was dead" frame

properties.title: 个人笔记本
properties.description: *获得麦卡勒姆的报告后，您将收到一个剧院钥匙，后台门将被解锁。您将下楼继续，直到到达一个充满多丽丝·弗莱彻剧本的房间。您会在头部雕像和“那个死去的人”框架前面找到一个小房间。必须找到由普里温守卫持有的顶层保险箱的新钥匙。

properties.description: *当你拥抱科科兰·蒂佩茨医生时，你将收到一个小钥匙，用于打开他办公室（靠近乔纳森·里德办公室）内的一个箱子，这会给你另一个小钥匙。现在打开箱子，箱子在地下停尸间的尸体旁边

properties.title: 大刀
properties.description: *On the lowered area in a basket
*被达里乌斯·佩特雷斯库拒绝后，前往大门并激活你的血视能力，观察达里乌斯和护士多萝西·克兰的互动
前往二楼并等待克莱顿·达尔比与克里斯蒂娜·波帕在封闭区域碰面
等待西摩·菲什伯恩走进房子以启动血视。你可以在窗户偷听
*鲁弗斯会下楼去和一只老鼠说话。前往阳台并使用血视
*在卡罗琳·普莱斯店外有一个栅栏，你可以在降低的区域看到窗户
等待珀里克利斯和阿伽门农进入大门区域进行窃听

properties.title: 弓箭手的斧头
properties.description: *拥抱后的奖励

properties.title: 布斯的斧头
properties.description: *拥抱后的奖励

properties.title: 血液如毒瘾
properties.description:
*在藏身处的桌子上

背景故事：对血液的需求

properties.title: 盲人美食家
properties.description: *在一楼

properties.title: 纯净水
properties.description:
*在医疗柜内

*将其倒在乔纳森·里德在彭布罗克医院办公室的植物上，然后睡3-4次，直到看到植物生长并获得成就“非生命奇异”

properties.title: 米尔顿·胡克斯
properties.description:
提示1：米尔顿在同事中的声誉平平
- *与皮帕·霍金斯交谈
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "员工们应对得如何？"
- "为什么米尔顿这么暴躁？"

提示2：米尔顿对彭布罗克医院的一些病人进行敲诈
- *在医院后方尸体上拾取皱巴巴的信件

提示3：米尔顿和霍金斯护士是一对恋人
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你的职业是什么？"
- "听起来你过得很艰难？"
- *找到钱包后归还给米尔顿

properties.title: 有角吸血鬼的传说
properties.description:
*在篮子上。前往阿斯卡隆庄园的后面，你会看到一扇通往隧道的门，沿着楼梯下去到达房间后

传说：传奇吸血鬼

properties.title: 神圣十字军
properties.description:
Trigger:
*Speak to Father Tobias Whitaker
- "Personal Question" 
- "Have you any family left?"
- "Where did you send him?"

properties.title: 珍藏的纪念品
properties.description:
触发器：*与克莱顿·达比交谈
- "个人问题"
- "关于你与克里斯蒂娜的关系？"
- "我道歉"

*找到羊毛围巾但不要将其交给克里斯蒂娜·波帕，否则你将失去提示3

properties.title: 小饰品及更多
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Barrett Lewis
- "Your life in London?"
- "Noticed anything out of the ordinary?"
- "Violence is increasing?"

properties.title: Harvey Fiddick
properties.description:
*关于彭布罗克医院
_________________________________
提示 2：Harvey 因受伤而责怪自己
答案：
- 来自 Thoreau Strickland 博士的提示
- “个人问题”
- “你似乎对你的家人感到担忧？”
________________________________
提示 3：Harvey 的妻子在战争中去世
答案：
- *在了解到提示 2 之后
- “个人问题”
- “关于你的输血技术？”
- “告诉我 Fiddick 先生的故事”

properties.title: 缺少的原料
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Dr. Thoreau Strickland
- "Your Life in London?"
- "About the Pembroke Hospital?"
- "Do you need my help?"

properties.title: 阅后即焚
properties.description:
Trigger: *Eavesdrop Mortimer and Beatrice Goswick then speak to Mortimer
- "You tried to kill yourself"
- "Can i help you?"

properties.title: 行业工具
properties.description:
触发条件：*在获得线索2后与克莱·考克斯对话
- "个人问题"
- "你妻子的信让你很愤怒？"
- "你不想要回来吗？"

properties.title: 善恶花园之午夜
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Milton Hooks
- "Your life in London?"
- "What is your occupation?"
- "You sound like you've had it rough?"

properties.title: 错误目标
properties.description:
触发：*与塞尔玛·豪克罗夫特交谈
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你是这里的病人吗？"

properties.title: 越强就越倒
properties.description: *On the Night Shift Quest, You'll find a Death Report on the table next to the corpse in the Morgue Underground to start the investigation

properties.title: 吸血鬼猎人非凡
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Ichabod Throgmorton
- "Your life in London?"
- "About your work?"
- "Do you need help?"
- *Any decision you make will give you the Hint

properties.title: 另一具谋杀的身体
properties.description: Trigger *When you pick up the Bloody Letter with The Small Pocket Watch

properties.title: 盗尸者
properties.description:
触发条件：*与艾德薇娜·考克斯交谈
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于城镇的这个区域？"
- "在想什么特别的人吗？"

properties.title: 必需品短缺
properties.description:
*在你返回码头时与Tom Watts在第3章对话
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你怎么能让这个地方继续营业？"
- "有什么我能做的吗？"

properties.title: 简单的孝爱象征
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Seymour Fishburn
- "Your Life in London?"
- "What is your role around here?"
- "Is something bothering you?"

properties.title: 向受害者致敬
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Dyson Delaney
- "Your life in London?"
- ''Anything you like about this district?"
- "No reason at all to rejoice?"
- "All right. Go on"

properties.title: 战利品
properties.description:
触发：*吉赛尔·帕克斯顿
- "个人问题"
- "你是工会活动家吗"
- "工会没有支持？"

properties.title: 他们就在我们之中
properties.description:
触发：*提示克拉伦斯后，然后与他说话
- "个人问题"
- "你对吸血鬼有什么发现？"
- "你是什么意思你并不孤单？"

*游戏BUG：某些物品不会被识别，如果你在开始任务前已经拿过该物品

properties.title: 艾米莉失踪
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Charlotte Ashbury
- "Your life in London?"
- "What do you do around here?"
- "How are the locals reacting?"

properties.title: 伦敦孤独美食家的惊喜
properties.description:
Trigger: *Speak to Calhoun Russel
- "Your life in London?"
- "Any interesting local news?"
- "I have specific tastes"

properties.title: 回到过去的旅程
properties.description: 触发条件：*前往乔纳森父亲的办公室

properties.title: 潘多拉魔盒
properties.description:
触发：*与引座员高树对话
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你在这里做什么？"
- "有些人认为你是吸血鬼？"
- *当你获得笔记本时，如果想要收集品就不要阅读它，但如果你想要提示就阅读笔记本

properties.title: 神秘眼球
properties.description:
触发条件：*找到所有4个盲文文本并交给梅森·斯旺伯勒。收集1个文本然后交给梅森，然后找到另一个，重复相同过程。

*游戏漏洞：
1. 如果你收集了所有4个文本，游戏会出错并且不接受这些文本。

2. 我得到了密码但门仍然在寻找密码

properties.title: Clay的斧头
properties.description: *拥抱后的奖励

properties.title: Dorothy Crane
properties.description:
提示 1：多萝西免费提供药品和医药
- *与巴雷特·刘易斯交谈
- "我在找护士多萝西·克兰"
- *回答任何问题

提示 2：多萝西在祖国是秘密抵抗者
- *与托比亚斯·惠特克神父交谈
- "我在找护士多萝西·克兰"
- "为什么讨厌克兰护士？"

提示 3：多萝西在罗马尼亚有一个妹妹
- *找到写给克兰护士的信

properties.title: Clayton Darby
properties.description:
提示 1：克莱顿希望报纸刊登有关白教堂状况的真相
- "你在伦敦的调查？"
- "你日落后在这儿做什么？"
- "你冒着生命危险揭露真相？"

提示 2：克莱顿和克里斯蒂娜·波帕上了床，而他本该采访她
- *在克里斯蒂娜·波帕提示2后
- "私人问题"
- "这个女人真的偷了你的钱包？"
- "你是怎么遇见她的？"

properties.title: Cristina Popa
properties.description:
提示1：克里斯蒂娜因为是移民而找不到任何体面的工作

提示2：克里斯蒂娜被克莱顿·达比怀疑偷了他的钱包
- *偷听

提示3：克里斯蒂娜存钱资助她哥哥前往英国
- *在提示2之后
- "个人问题"
- "你偷了克莱顿·达比的钱包吗？"
- "也许克莱顿不一样"

提示4：克里斯蒂娜和克莱顿·达比互相喜欢
- *与克莱顿·达比交谈获得提示4
- *不要把羊毛围巾给克里斯蒂娜

properties.title: 埃德加·斯旺西博士
properties.description:
提示 1：埃德加不能忍受家人被吸血鬼杀死
- *参加完玛丽的葬礼后，直接去见埃德加·斯旺西医生，然后再去圣玛丽教堂
- “你曾经失去过亲人被吸血鬼杀死吗？”

提示 2：埃德加认为自己是圣保罗会中一个特立独行的人
- *第4章，去西区之前
- “在西区的帮助”
- “圣保罗会在哪里”

properties.title: 肖恩·汉普顿
properties.description:
Hint 1: Sean was abandoned in a catholic orphanage when he was a baby
- *Speak to Tom Watts
- "I'm looking Sean Hampton?"
- "Did he return from his flock?"

Hint 2: Sean got molested by a priest when he was a child
- *Speak to Ichabod Throgmorton
- "I'm looking for Sean Hampton"
- "I respect your refusal"

properties.title: 洛蒂·帕克斯顿
properties.description:
Hint 1: Lottie, and her sister Giselle Paxton are poor and homeless since their mother died
- *Find the Handwritten Prayer

Hint 2: Lottie helps a lot of Sean Hampton's charities in his shelter
- *Speak to Giselle Paxton
- "Personal Question"
-  "Resentment between you and your sister?"
"Lottie sees herself as an angel?"

Hint 3: Lottie has always refused  to help the  Wet Boot Boys despite their threats
- *Find the Burnt Letter

properties.title: 吉赛尔的匕首
properties.description: *拥抱后的奖励

properties.title: Tom's Revolver
properties.description: *Reward after Embrace

properties.title: Rodney Grader
properties.description: *到达斯卡尔斯藏身处后。在哈丽特·琼斯房间附近，有一个楼梯向下走，然后向右走进入一个隧道，找到罗德尼·格雷德。在与他交谈之前获取罗德尼的提示5。睡觉后罗德尼会出现在西码头。

properties.title: 野兽之腹肥沃丰饶
properties.description: *在藏身处的梳妆台上。必须在"阅后即焚"任务中

properties.title: 阿洛伊修斯·道森
properties.description:
提示1：他的双胞胎兄弟死于飞机失事
- *在与阿洛伊修斯·道森会面前先与卡罗琳·普莱斯交谈
- "你认识阿洛伊修斯·道森吗"

提示2：阿洛伊修斯曾是黄金黎明赫尔墨斯教团的成员，直到1900年
- *在与阿洛伊修斯·道森会面前先与亚瑟交谈
- "你认识阿洛伊修斯·道森吗？"

properties.title: 兄弟会的起源
properties.description:
*不要阅读个人笔记本以获取此收藏品

背景故事：圣保罗兄弟会盗取

properties.title: 保卢斯·奥勒利安努斯的回忆录
properties.description: *你必须在不查看亚瑟笔记本的情况下完成潘多拉魔盒才能获得兄弟会起源收藏品。在收藏品中，你会在右上角看到一个符号，它代表亚瑟区域入口处的4个方格。序列是鱼-圆圈-方块-圆圈-鱼-菱形，这将打开一扇门

properties.title: 真正的灭龙者
properties.description: *你必须在不打开查看亚瑟手记的情况下完成潘多拉的盒子，以获得兄弟会起源收藏品。在收藏品中，你会看到右上角有一个符号，它代表亚瑟区域入口的4个正方形。顺序是鱼-圆-方形-圆-鱼-菱形，它会打开一扇门

properties.description:
提示1：西摩是个惯犯杀手
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你在这里的角色是什么？"
- "有什么事困扰着你吗？"
- *找到血腥项链并交给西摩以获得提示

提示2：西摩嫉妒母亲对鲁弗斯的关注
- *偷听

提示3：西摩的攻击性似乎被他母亲所压制

properties.description:

- "How do you feel?"
- "Why don't you just leave this place?"

Hint 2: Harry did not want to live in Whitechapel in the first place
- *Use mesmerize to go in the house
- "Your life in London?"
- "Not happy to live in Whitechapel?"
- *Answer anything

Hint 3: Harry has a difficult relationship with his father Joe Peterson
- *Eavesdrop

You will go down and continue till you reach a room full of frames of Doris Fletcher's play. You will find a small room in front of the Head Statue and "The man who was dead" frame

*在药柜上，靠近通往安全屋的门。必须在神秘Oculus任务中

传说：传奇吸血鬼

properties.title: 乔·彼得森
properties.description:
提示1：乔的敲诈勒索让巴雷特·刘易斯陷入了困难的财务状况
- *与巴雷特·刘易斯交谈

提示2：乔和巴雷特·刘易斯曾经是好朋友
- *在提示1之后
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你喜欢欺负别人吗？"
- *说任何话

提示3：他与儿子哈里的关系很复杂
- *偷听

提示4：乔因为犯罪名声而找不到合法工作
- *在他们家里找到拒绝信并阅读

properties.title: 巴雷特·刘易斯
properties.description:
Hint 1: Barret is in a tough financial situation because of Joe's extortions

- "Your life in London?"
- "How is business?"

Hint 2: Barrett and Joe Peterson used to be good friends
- *After Joe Peterson Hint 2

Hint 3: Barrett had an affair with Joe Peterson's wife
- "Your life in London?"
- "Noticed anything out of the ordinary?"
- "Violence is increasing?"
- * Do the Trinkets and More Quest and check the item

properties.title: 托比亚斯·惠特克 神父
properties.description:
Hint 1: Tobias has already killed several sick people during his crusade to cleanse the city
- "Personal Question"
- "Have you any family left?"
- "Where did you send him?"

Hint 2: Tobias crusade is funded by his apprentice grave digging activities
- *After the Holy Crusade Quest
- "Personal Question"
- "Your disciple was a grave robber"

properties.title: 萨布丽娜·卡文迪什
properties.description:
提示1：萨布丽娜被汤姆·沃茨教导如何使用枪支来保护自己
- *偷听

提示2：萨布丽娜隐藏了她对老板汤姆·沃茨的真实感受
- *阅读撕掉的日记页

提示3：萨布丽娜认为码头很危险，在那里感到不安全
- *离开码头后返回
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于码头？"
- *询问任何事情

提示4：萨布丽娜曾经被一名客户袭击过
- *在提示1之后
- "个人问题"
- "你为什么有枪？"
- "枪支很危险"

properties.title: 伊卡博德·斯罗格莫顿
properties.description:
Hint 1: Ichabod believes vampires have killed Jack Gillingham
- "Your life in London?"
- "About this neighborhood?"

Hint2: Ichabod considers himself the protector of Sean Hampton's night shelter
- "Your life in London?"
- "About your work?"
- "Do you need help?"
- *Complete the Vampire Hunter Extraordinaire and any decision will not matter

Hint 3: Ichabod is not considered a real vampire hunter by the Guard of Priwen
- *Find the The Guard of Priwen note and read it

properties.title: 夏洛特·阿什伯里
properties.description:
提示1：夏洛特在阿什伯里女士的孤儿院长大，后来被女士本人收养
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于你的收养？"
- "你是如何遇见阿什伯里女士的？"

提示2：夏洛特对吸血鬼了解很多，似乎并不害怕他们
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你对我了解什么"
- *回答任何问题

提示3：夏洛特仍然希望成为吸血鬼，尽管她母亲不同意
- *找到个人日记并阅读

properties.title: 卡尔霍恩·拉塞尔
properties.description:
Hint 2: Calhoun does not consider the seriousness and dangerousness of epidemic
- "Your life in London?"
- "Tell me about the neighborhood?"
- "It's false"

Hint 3: Calhoun likes good restaurants and succulent tables
- "Your life in London?"
- "Any interesting local news?"
- "Is food all that interests you?"
Hint 3: Calhoun likes good restaurants and succulent tables
- "Your life in London?"
- "Any interesting local news?"
- "Is food all that interests you?"

properties.title: Louise Teasdale
properties.description:
Hint 1: Louise's father has tried to rescue her
- *Find the Pinned Letter and read it

Hint 2: Louise 's father has been killed while trying to find and rescue her
- *Find the Soiled Letter and read it

Hint 3: Louise's abductor wanted to make her a vampire
- *You will receive the Recent Diary after you save Louise. read it to get the hint

Hint 4: Louise has run away from her house after a violent argument with her father

properties.title: 木村忠雄
properties.description:
提示1：忠雄被一个发现了他对天文学热情的吸血鬼抓获
- "个人问题"
- "告诉我你被绑架的事？"
- "为什么不当场牺牲你？"

提示2：忠雄是一个怀念家乡的富有地主
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你以什么为生？"

提示3：忠雄离开了家人，多年未见儿子
- "个人问题"
- "怀念你的家乡"
- "你的家人怎么样？"

properties.title: Usher Talltree
properties.description:
Hint 1: Usher seems to know that many Londoners have been recently murdered
- *Speaking with Usher will trigger the hint

Hint 2: Usher is aware of the real circumstances of Mary's death
- "Your life in London?"
-"Tell me about your neighborhood"

properties.title: Carol Price
properties.description:
Hint 1: Carol's mother has always taken good care of her when she was injured
- "Your life in London?"
- "Awake at night?"
- "Work is not easy?"

Hint 2: Carol is often hurt by her "clumsy" mother
- *Eavesdrop

Hint 3: Carol seems unable to remove herself from her mother's influence, for now.
- *After Carolyn Price Hint 4
- "Personal Question"
- "Your mother is a threat to you"
- "Your mother will kill you"

properties.title: Carolyn Price
properties.description:
Hint 1: Carolyn has always taken good care of her daughter whenever she was injured
- *Speak to Carol Price

Hint 2: Carolyn often hurts her daughter by "clumsiness"
- *Eavesdrop

Hint 3: Carolyn admits she has a thing for her former physician, Doctor Jonathan Reid
- "Your life in London?"
- "Tell me about your occupation"
- "Tell me about yourself"

Hint 4: Carolyn may be suffering from some unknown mental disorder
- *After Hint Hint 1 and 2
- "Personal Question"
- "You abuse your daughter!"

properties.title: Albert Palmer
properties.description:
提示 1：艾伯特想向湿靴帮证明他有当帮派成员的潜质
-*提示2后
- "私人问题"
- "关于你和父亲的关系？"
- "他可能很危险"

提示 2：艾伯特偷了父亲的药品
- *窃听

提示 3：艾伯特加入疝靴帮后本该见帮派首领
- *必须阅读湿靴帮的笔记

properties.title: Loretta Swanborough
properties.description:
Hint 1: The Swanborough miracle elixir is a fraud
- *Buy the Swanborough elixir and check it on your inventory to trigger hint

Hint 2: Loretta believes she gave Mason Swanborough a goal by having him create the miracle elixir
- "Personal Question"
- "Why feel so guilty about your brother?"
- "Easing your remorse?"

Hint 3: Loretta still blames herself for Mason Swanborough's accident
- *Find Loretta's Letter inside Mason Swanborough's house

properties.title: 萧顺
properties.description:
提示2：小顺的丈夫死于疾病
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于你丈夫的死？"

提示3：小顺为没有发现丈夫的病情而感到内疚
- *提示2之后
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "你为什么要责备自己？"

提示4：小顺希望找到一个能发挥自己作用的地方
- *询问何时在白教堂
- "个人问题"
- "你现在感觉如何？"
- "这是明智的态度"

properties.title: 卡多根·贝茨
properties.description:
Hint 1: Cadogan is making money by renting squalid flats to the Whitechapel migrants
- "Your life in London?"
- "What is your business exactly?"
- *Answer anything

Hint 2: Cadogan sees Dorothy Crane's dispensary as a fine thing, since she keeps his tenants in good health
-*After seeing Dorothy Crane
- "Any new for Nurse Crane's dispensary?"
- "I'm sure you know more"

Hint 3: Cadogan has been attacked by vengeful Skals he used to exploit as his tenants
- *Find the Petition Letter

properties.title: Richard Nithercott
properties.description:
Hint 1: Richard sees Camellia as his muse, and a "locked mystery"
- "Personal Question"
- "Why seek inspiration in Whitechapel?"
- "Do you not think it a little morbid?"

Hint 2: Richard has never succeeded in poetry
- *Find the Editor Refusal Letter

Hint 3 Richards feels guilty about depending on his parents financial support
- "Personal Question"
- "Do you make a living from your writing?"
- "A rick artist is rare"

properties.title: 科科伦·蒂佩特斯 医生
properties.description:
Hint 1: Corcoran is convinced that Gwyneth Branagan is overqualified
- "Your life in london?"
- "Tell me about the staff?"
- "Positive Characters?"

Hint 2: Corcoran is exhausting himself, and refuse to stop working
- "Your life in London?"
- "Tell me about the staff?"
- "Anyone stands out?"

Hint 3: Corcoran is a drug addict
- *Eavesdrop

properties.title: 碧翠斯·戈斯威克
properties.description:
*关于彭布罗克医院
_________________________________
提示 1: 贝亚特丽斯质疑彭布罗克医院的效率
- “关于接待处的投诉？”

properties.title: 莫蒂默·戈斯威克
properties.description:
提示1：莫蒂默打算结束自己的生命
- *偷听

提示2：莫蒂默没有感染西班牙流感
- *找到M.戈斯维克的医疗档案并阅读

提示3：莫蒂默似乎决心要自杀
- *在"阅后即焚"任务中找到折叠的信件

properties.title: 韦弗利·阿克罗伊德医生
properties.description:
提示1：韦弗利不赞成现代医学方法
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于彭布罗克医院的事？"

提示2：韦弗利不会利用法规来贬低梭罗·斯特里克兰，尽管他们是竞争对手
- *在提示3之后可用
- "个人问题"
- "斯特里克兰治愈流感的机会"

提示3：韦弗利的技能备受推崇，但他被视为傲慢自大
- *拾取警告信后，前往斯旺西的信件将添加到物品栏中。阅读信件以触发提示

properties.title: 托·瓦特
properties.description: *在蓝绿色海龟酒吧

properties.title: 弓箭手·伍德比德
properties.description:
提示1：自从安德鲁加入普里温守卫队后，阿彻就没有收到儿子的任何消息
- *在从吸血鬼手中救出他并与他交谈后

提示2：阿彻曾经领导湿靴帮，当时他们还是个受人尊敬的帮派
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "关于这个街区？"
- "帮派的情况呢？"

提示3：阿彻将儿子的失踪归咎于普里温守卫队
- "个人问题"
- "告诉我关于普里温守卫队的事？"

properties.title: 查尔斯·杰罗姆·奥尔布赖特
properties.description:
提示 1：查尔斯认为一个杀人狂正隐藏在流行病背后
- “你在伦敦的生活？”
- “告诉我关于你的社区？”
- “哪个杀手？”

提示 2：查尔斯因为将无辜之人送上绞刑架而被降职
- *找到报纸文章并阅读

提示 3：查尔斯不相信死刑
- *提示2之后
- “个人问题”
- “是真的吗，你被降职了？”
- “死刑是可耻的”

properties.title: 牛顿沼地
properties.description:
提示 1：纽顿和奥斯瓦尔德·撒切尔在战时被轰炸活埋
- *与奥斯瓦尔德·撒切尔交谈

提示 2：纽顿和奥斯瓦尔德·撒切尔彼此相爱
- *窃听

提示 3：纽顿不接受自己的同性恋身份
- *提示2之后
- “个人问题”
- “你对奥斯瓦尔德·撒切尔感觉如何？”
提示 4：纽顿对老鼠的恐惧让他无法营救失踪的朋友
- “你在伦敦的生活？”
- “你为什么留在这里？”

properties.title: 奥斯瓦尔德·撒切尔
properties.description:
提示 1：奥斯瓦尔德和纽顿·布莱特在战争中被活埋
- “个人问题”
- “你害怕被封闭”
- “你被埋葬了”

提示 2：奥斯瓦尔德和纽顿·布莱特彼此相爱
- *窃听

提示 3：奥斯瓦尔德更倾向于自己处理幽闭恐惧症，并不想要医院治疗
- “你在伦敦的生活？”
- “你为什么被锁起来？”
- “幽闭恐惧症？”

properties.title: 格温妮丝·布拉纳根
properties.description:
Hint 1: Gwyneth is overqualified as a nurse, according to Corcoran Tippets
- *Speak to Dr Tippets

Hint 2: Gwyneth has been suspected of neglecting her professional duties
- *Find the Letter of Swansea on Dr. Strickland's office

Hint 3: Gwyneth has covered Corcoran Tippet's medical error
- *After Hint 5
- "Personal Question"
- "Tippet's medical error"
- *Answer anything
*Do not answer that you will cover for Dr. Tippets, So you won't lose the hint for Dr. Tippet. You have to say it to him.

properties.title: 皮帕·霍金斯
properties.description:
*关于彭布罗克医院
_________________________________
提示 2：皮帕为能付费的患者预留床位
- *比阿特丽斯·戈西克的提示
- “你在伦敦的生活？”
- “对这里接待的不满？”
- “告诉我关于你的到来？”

properties.title: Rufus Kingberry
properties.description:
Hint 1: Rufus views Stella Fishburn as a mother.
- "Personal Question"
- "Are you alone?"
- *Answer anything

Hint 2: Rufus feels threatened by Seymour Fishburn's behavior
- *After Seymour Hint 2
- "Personal Question"
- "What do you think of Seymour?"
- *Answer anything

Hint 3: Rufus sole friend is a rat
- *Eavesdrop

Hint 4: Rufus's parents died when he was a child
- *After Hint 3
- "Personal Question"
- "Your only friend is a rat?"

properties.title: 埃德温娜·考克斯
properties.description:
提示1：埃德维娜和布思·迪格比最近为了报复杀死了一个人
- "你在伦敦的生活？"
- "告诉我你的生活？"
- "我完全不感兴趣"

提示3：埃德维娜怀疑布思·迪格比不忠
- *在提示2之后
- "个人问题"
- "你对布思·迪格比的感情？"
- "我没那么容易震惊"

提示4：埃德维娜不信任布思·迪格比的领导能力，因为他很迷信
- "个人问题"
- "关于布思对怪物的信仰？"

properties.title: 小袋钱币
properties.description: On the corpse in the ground. Spoils of war Quest

properties.title: 火与阳
properties.description:
*在第一次介绍动作时你躲藏的房子里。在一楼的书架上

传说：吸血鬼的弱点

properties.title: 梅森·斯旺伯勒
properties.description:
提示1：斯万伯勒奇迹药剂是个骗局
- *与洛蕾塔·斯万伯勒交谈

提示2：梅森尽管失明但仍在继续练习化学 
- *偷听

提示3：梅森是最初提出斯万伯勒奇迹药剂想法的人
- *必须拥有催眠术3级
- "私人问题"
- "你姐姐在利用你吗？"
